updates.title: ABA Sports is live!
updates.description: Track matches, scores, and standings for the ABA league. View live scoreboards and detailed match stats all in one place.

updates.title: When2Meet is here!
updates.description: Create a shared calendar to find the best meeting time with your group. Select your available time slots and share the link with participants.

updates.title: Wordle Friends!
updates.description: Invite your friends to Ashoka Wordle! Compare daily scores, streaks, and compete head-to-head. Send invites via email directly from the game.
